autoFixable.title: Add Add<Module> self-registration entry point for Infrastructure.TfsObjectModel
autoFixable.fix: Create AddTfsObjectModelModule(IServiceCollection, IConfiguration) in Infrastructure.TfsObjectModel encapsulating module-internal registrations; host calls it.
autoFixable.rationale: DI wiring relocation behind existing canonical surfaces; no contract behavior change and no new runtime entrypoint (a composition extension method is internal wiring, not a canonical surface).

autoFixable.title: Consolidate CLI.Migration scattered module-internal DI registrations into module extensions
autoFixable.fix: Move registrations into owning modules' ServiceCollectionExtensions; commands call the single module entry point.
autoFixable.rationale: Internal composition refactor; behavior at canonical surfaces unchanged.

autoFixable.title: Relocate layer-first Models folders next to owning concerns
autoFixable.fix: Move types beside their owning concern folders; delete generic Models folders.
autoFixable.rationale: File/namespace organisation only; no surface or behavior change.

autoFixable.title: Extract JobAgentWorker config-normalisation into a use-case service
autoFixable.fix: Extract generator propagation, wrapper deserialization, probe payload construction into a JobConfigResolver behind an abstraction; add unit tests.
autoFixable.rationale: Behavior-preserving extraction, but it touches config-resolution behavior observable at the job-execution surface; per Class B needs behavioral tests across impacted slices and perspective evidence, no new canonical surface (internal abstraction).

autoFixable.title: Move QueueCommand phase/task/blocking-findings logic into a read-model service
autoFixable.fix: Extract phase resolution, task aggregation, duration statistics and blocking-findings evaluation into a task-summary service; command renders the view model.
autoFixable.rationale: Affects behavior adjacent to CLI output surface without adding a new canonical surface; requires slice behavioral tests.

autoFixable.title: Push Enabled-organisation filter into the discovery orchestrator
autoFixable.fix: Apply the enabled filter in the dependency-discovery orchestrator/config projection; command iterates a pre-filtered collection.
autoFixable.rationale: Moves a business rule to the use-case layer, changing where behavior applies at the existing surface; no new surface.

autoFixable.title: Consolidate duplicated task grouping/phase rules between TUI view and QueueCommand
autoFixable.fix: Consolidate discovery-module derivation and phase-membership rules into the shared task-summary/read-model service (with CA-M2).
autoFixable.rationale: Presentation-adjacent behavior consolidation at existing surfaces; no new contract.

autoFixable.title: Add environment-reader seam to ConfigTokenResolver
autoFixable.fix: Inject Func<string,string?>/IEnvironmentReader defaulting to Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable at the composition root.
autoFixable.rationale: Internal testability seam behind existing token-resolution behavior; default preserves behavior, no contract change.

autoFixable.title: Route diagnostics session id via IConfiguration and move directory I/O into the exporter
autoFixable.fix: Read Telemetry__DiagnosticsSessionId via IConfiguration; keep directory creation inside the exporter.
autoFixable.rationale: Internal wiring change; identical observable behavior.

autoFixable.title: Remove raw Directory.CreateDirectory from Serilog bootstrap in Program.cs
autoFixable.fix: Let the Serilog File sink create the directory or move path prep into an infrastructure helper.
autoFixable.rationale: Composition-root cleanup with no surface change.

autoFixable.title: Delete dead NodeReplicationProgress.StateKey constant and fix stale XML docs
autoFixable.fix: Remove the unused StateKey constant; correct XML docs to describe package-content persistence via NodesOrchestrator.SaveProgressAsync.
autoFixable.rationale: Dead-code deletion and doc correction; no behavior change.

autoFixable.title: Update nkda-archcheck-vertical-slice SKILL.md Check 5 to reflect MSTest internal DSL
autoFixable.fix: Rewrite Check 5 to validate slice acceptance coverage against Testing.Dsl scenario tests instead of .feature files.
autoFixable.rationale: Skill documentation update aligning docs with the already-decided architecture (commits #126/#127); no code surface touched.

autoFixable.title: Rename EndpointSlugHelper to a domain-revealing name in its own file
autoFixable.fix: Rename to EndpointSlug/OrganisationEndpointSlug and move to its own file.
autoFixable.rationale: Rename/relocation of an internal helper; no contract behavior change.

autoFixable.title: Rename NodeReadinessOrchestrator.ExecuteAsync to a business verb
autoFixable.fix: Rename ExecuteAsync to PrepareRequiredNodePathsAsync or EnsureNodeReadinessAsync.
autoFixable.rationale: Freely-renameable internal method; behavior unchanged.

autoFixable.title: Rename InventoryOrchestrator.RunAsync to a business verb
autoFixable.fix: Rename RunAsync to RunInventoryAsync or RecordInventoryAsync.
autoFixable.rationale: Internal rename; behavior unchanged.

autoFixable.title: Optionally rename TelemetryPoller.RunAsync to PollTelemetryAsync
autoFixable.fix: Rename RunAsync to PollTelemetryAsync.
autoFixable.rationale: CLI view-infrastructure rename; no contract impact.

autoFixable.title: Add CLI-level SystemTest for the work-items import slice
autoFixable.fix: Add a [TestCategory("SystemTest")] scenario queueing an import job from a prepared package and asserting target-side output.
autoFixable.rationale: Test-only addition; no production surface touched. Adding behavioral tests is Class A required evidence, not a change class escalation.

autoFixable.title: Add SystemTests for config, controlplane start, and agent start command slices
autoFixable.fix: Add [TestCategory("SystemTest")] tests invoking each command family via the CLI entry point and asserting observable output.
autoFixable.rationale: Test-only addition; no production surface change.

autoFixable.title: Delegate IdentitiesModule.CaptureAsync orchestration to IIdentitiesOrchestrator
autoFixable.fix: Move enumeration loop and inventory merge into IIdentitiesOrchestrator.CaptureAsync; module delegates like WorkItemsModule.
autoFixable.rationale: Restores the documented module/orchestrator split at an existing canonical surface (IModule phase behavior unchanged externally, but sequencing moves across the module/orchestrator boundary); needs behavioral tests and perspective evidence.

autoFixable.title: Delegate TeamsModule Capture/Prepare orchestration to ITeamsOrchestrator
autoFixable.fix: Move CaptureAsync enumeration and PrepareAsync report generation/persistence into ITeamsOrchestrator methods.
autoFixable.rationale: Same as MC-M1: brings implementation into compliance with module-model.md behind existing IModule surface; slice behavioral tests required.

autoFixable.title: Delegate NodesModule Capture/Prepare orchestration to INodesOrchestrator
autoFixable.fix: Move CaptureAsync counting and PrepareAsync report persistence into INodesOrchestrator methods.
autoFixable.rationale: Same pattern as MC-M2; existing surfaces, behavioral evidence required.

autoFixable.title: Fix ModuleBase inconsistent unsupported-phase defaults (or delete dead abstraction)
autoFixable.fix: Make all unsupported-phase defaults return TaskExecutionResult.Skipped with a warning, or delete the zero-subclass ModuleBase.
autoFixable.rationale: Dead abstraction with zero subclasses in src/ — changing/deleting it alters no live contract behavior.

autoFixable.title: Stop AgentControlPlaneClientAdapter bare catch swallowing cancellation
autoFixable.fix: Rethrow OperationCanceledException, route transient HTTP failures through IResiliencePipelineProvider, log a structured warning before returning false.
autoFixable.rationale: Fixes error-handling behavior at an existing adapter surface per the written connector-model rule; no new surface. Needs behavioral tests for the cancellation/lock-steal scenario.

autoFixable.title: Route ADO adapter SDK calls through IResiliencePipelineProvider instead of inline catch-all
autoFixable.fix: Wrap SDK calls in the resilience pipeline; surface non-transient failures as contract results rather than swallowed catches.
autoFixable.rationale: Aligns implementation with the already-authoritative connector-model.md rule ('Retry is via IResiliencePipelineProvider, not inline') behind existing adapter surfaces; behavior at the surface changes (failures no longer silently empty), so B with slice tests.

autoFixable.title: Rework TfsNullBoardAdapter from throwing stub to empty-plus-warning per contract
autoFixable.fix: Return empty sequences/no-op results with structured Warning logs, mirroring TfsIdentityAdapter.
autoFixable.rationale: connector-model.md already mandates the reduced-capability contract result pattern; this brings the adapter into compliance with the existing documented contract — surface-adjacent behavior change, not a contract change.

autoFixable.title: Remove duplicate NodeTranslationTool concrete registration beside canonical seam
autoFixable.fix: Fix the net481 path inside AddNodeTranslationToolServices as the single registration site; consumers depend only on INodeTranslationTool.
autoFixable.rationale: Removes a forbidden parallel entry point, restoring the single canonical seam — implementation change behind the existing INodeTranslationTool surface.

autoFixable.title: Stop NodesOrchestrator binding NodeTranslation options directly; expose gating via INodeTranslationTool
autoFixable.fix: Expose IsEnabled/HasMappings on INodeTranslationTool (or via existing surface) and remove the orchestrator's IOptionsMonitor<NodeTranslationOptions> dependency.
autoFixable.rationale: Adjusts how a consumer accesses the tool's config at the existing seam; if it requires widening INodeTranslationTool with new members, run the B evidence set and reconfirm classification before merging.

needsOperator.title: Remove Infrastructure.TfsObjectModel -> Infrastructure.Storage.FileSystem ProjectReference
needsOperator.fix: Delete the ProjectReference; move the AddPackageBoundaryServices() call to the TfsMigrationAgent host composition root; depend only on Abstractions.Storage contracts.
needsOperator.blockerReason: Class C per change-classes.yaml: "Change adds, replaces, widens, narrows, or bypasses a canonical surface or blackbox contract." Removing the module-to-module reference and relocating storage-implementation selection narrows the module's dependency surface and changes which composition root owns the package-boundary contract wiring — a contract-level boundary change (also intertwined with MM-H1). change-governance.md rule 3: "Class C: blocked unless operator consent + ADR + contract tests are all present."
requiredEvidence: Test-first trace showing RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR

needsOperator.title: Extract subprocess host composition root out of Infrastructure.TfsObjectModel
needsOperator.fix: Move the subprocess host builder (Serilog, OTel, storage selection) to the TfsMigrationAgent host or a dedicated host project; module exposes only AddTfsObjectModelModule.
needsOperator.blockerReason: Relocating the DI host builder replaces the canonical composition entrypoint for the TFS subprocess — change-classes.yaml Class C: "adds, replaces ... or bypasses a canonical surface". A new/moved host entrypoint is a surface/contract change, and change-governance.md rejects any change "labels a change as A/B while introducing contract-level surface change".
requiredEvidence: Test-first trace showing RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR

needsOperator.title: Introduce IWorkerEventWriter port for UnifiedWorkerEventWriter

needsOperator.blockerReason: Adding a new port interface in Abstractions is a Class C change: change-classes.yaml C definition — "Change adds ... a canonical surface or blackbox contract." A new Abstractions interface is a new canonical surface.
requiredEvidence: Test-first trace showing RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR

needsOperator.title: Remove Infrastructure.Storage.FileSystem dependency from job workers
needsOperator.fix: Depend only on Abstractions.Storage ports (IArtefactStore, IPackageAccess, factories); resolve FileSystem implementations only in the composition root.
needsOperator.blockerReason: Eliminating the concrete-storage binding requires the workers to consume storage exclusively through the package-boundary contract, changing which surfaces the use-case ring is bound to — change-classes.yaml Class C: change that "narrows, or bypasses a canonical surface"; the current code bypasses Abstractions.Storage and the fix re-scopes the contract boundary. Coupled with MM-C1.
requiredEvidence: Test-first trace showing RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR
